[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010000100 2
1 100010101 4
2 000110010 3
3 000111001 4
4 011101010 5
5 111001000 4
6 010000001 2
7 110001101 5
